subject: <no subject>
body:
Tried your line..it answers saying this is  test of the epstein phone system
I have changed my plans and will meet with her Tues..I think this is best
I will also get to Barden to ask for an extension so we can explore the best way forward. Everyone I have talked to says this gets tossed..I would rather have it tossed than anything else..it is with out merit in every dept and this NY not rinky dink
Plse confirm the name of the person and can I call her tomorrow?
Call me back

THE TERRAMAR PROJECT<http://theterramarproject.org/>
